title: 6PCS Silver Black Star Balloons, 22Inch Large Explosion Star Balloon Foil Balloons Spike Cone Balloon for Birthday Anniversary New Years Party Decorations
features: Star Foil Balloons: This set includes 6 pieces of 22-inch, one-piece, 14-pointed star balloons in striking colors: black and gold. These elegant star-shaped balloons add a sophisticated touch to your party and are perfect for various celebrations

Premium Quality: The black and gold star balloons are crafted from high-quality aluminum foil, ensuring they are reusable, durable, and odorless. They maintain air for an extended period, keeping your party decorations looking fabulous

Party Decorations: Our 6-pack of black and gold star balloons is ideal for a range of occasions! Perfect for upscale birthday parties, elegant weddings, New Year’s Eve celebrations, anniversary parties, and holiday gatherings, these balloons enhance the festive atmosphere

Easy to Use: These star balloons feature a convenient one-piece design for effortless decoration. No assembly is required—simply inflate and they self-seal. Hang them with string or attach them to walls with glue to elevate your party decor

Warm Tips: Do not overfill the balloons. Keep them away from sunlight, sharp objects, and excessive friction to prevent damage. The star balloons are self-sealing and can last for weeks with normal use
description: Product Description Elevate Your Celebration Elegant colorful star balloons for birthday anniversary festival Christmas party decorations.
